chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5438 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is about 02 years ago. On the last two dates of hearing i.e. 08.08.2024 & 20.03.2025, none was present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. It seems that the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Once-again, today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
